hero.title: Control Your
hero.subtitle: A modern GTK4 utility to monitor and switch CPU frequency scaling governors — fast, secure, and beautiful.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: A complete CPU management experience built for the modern Linux desktop.

items.title: Instant Switching
items.desc: Switch between Performance, Powersave, and other governors instantly with one click.

items.title: Real-Time Monitoring
items.desc: Watch live per-core CPU frequencies across all cores in real time.

items.title: Secure by Design
items.desc: Polkit authentication ensures the GUI never runs as root. Safe and standards-compliant.

items.title: Modern Interface
items.desc: Built with GTK4 + libadwaita for a native GNOME experience that feels right at home.

items.title: Multilanguage
items.desc: Available in English, Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese, Chinese, and Italian.

items.title: Persistent Settings
items.desc: Your preferred governor is remembered and restored automatically on every boot.

download.title: Get CPU Governor
download.subtitle: Available as a native Debian package and open source on GitHub.
download.debSub: For Debian, Ubuntu, Parrot OS and more

install.title: Installation Guide
install.subtitle: Choose your preferred way to install the complete software (App + Daemon).
install.step1Desc: The recommended way for Debian-based systems. It installs the GUI, the background daemon, and configures Polkit automatically.
install.step2Desc: A single command to build and install the complete system from source. Ideal for other distributions or testing.

screenshots.title: See Every Detail
screenshots.subtitle: A clean, native interface designed to stay out of your way while keeping everything visible at a glance.

tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.s1Body: By accessing this website or using the CPU Governor software, you agree to comply with all applicable local laws and regulations. The software is provided as a utility for managing CPU frequency scaling governors on Linux systems.
tos.s2Body: CPU Governor is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. You are free to use, modify, and distribute the software in accordance with the terms of this license.
tos.s3Body: THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY.
tos.s4Body: Changing CPU governors affects hardware power consumption and thermal performance. Use extreme caution when using high-performance settings on systems with limited cooling. We are not responsible for any hardware issues arising from the use of this software.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: At CPU Governor, accessible from cpugov.app, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by CPU Governor and how we use it.
privacy.s2Body: CPU Governor and its official website follow a strict no-tracking policy:
privacy.s2i1Desc: We do not use cookies or similar tracking technologies.
privacy.s2i2Desc: We do not track your behavior or hold log files of your visit.
privacy.s2i3Desc: We do not sell or share any user information with third parties.
privacy.s3Body: Our website is deployed on Vercel. While we do not collect data, Vercel may collect standard web logs required for technical operations (e.g., IP addresses, browser type, and timestamps). These logs are not used by us for tracking or identification purposes.
privacy.s4Body: The CPU Governor application operates entirely locally on your machine. It does not send telemetry, crash reports, or usage statistics to any remote server. Your system settings stay on your system.

parrot.title: Built for Parrot OS
parrot.subtitle: We love Parrot Security! CPU Governor is the perfect companion for your security-focused desktop.
parrot.desc: Fully compatible with Parrot OS Security and Home editions. Optimized for performance and power management out of the box.
